description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a striking cyberpunk-inspired design. The can is predominantly black, featuring intricate yellow circuit board patterns that wrap around its body, giving it a high-tech, futuristic appearance. A wide metallic silver band encircles the middle, providing a visual break in the circuitry and adding a sleek, modern touch. On one side, bold stylized text in yellow and blue reads 'Cyber Beer 2.0', set against the silver band, making the product name highly visible. The top of the can is metallic gray with a classic pull tab opening. The overall look is bold, eye-catching, and designed to stand out in urban environments.
description: A black aluminum beer can with yellow circuit board graphics, a silver band, and bold 'Cyber Beer 2.0' text. The design is futuristic and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black can with yellow circuit patterns and a wide silver band, but without the main label text visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the continuation of the yellow circuitry and the metallic silver band, with no visible text.
description_view_2: Direct view of the can's main label, displaying the 'Cyber Beer 2.0' text prominently over the silver band and surrounded by yellow circuitry.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the edge of the label text and the detailed circuit board graphics wrapping around the can.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold yellow circuit board patterns on a black background, with a wide metallic silver band encircling the can. The typography is stylized and futuristic, with the product name in large, angular letters accented by blue highlights.
